note: Append-only fly-shop calibration log. One record = one shop report for one river on one day. Never overwrite; each scrape appends. PULL-AND-PARK: the scraper collects ALL rivers a shop offers, but off-gauge rivers (no gauge in this app yet) are parked with gauges:[] and active:false -- collected + dated from day one so future drainages (e.g. Clark Fork incl. Rock Creek) start with banked history. Activating later = fill gauges[] + flip active:true; no re-scrape, no reformat. Active queries filter active:true. Fly table primary; tip prose cross-checks. Ratings normalized to 0-10 (rating.value0to10). Shop water temp is SOFT cross-check only -- our gauges authoritative. nameCanonical (alias layer, build-step 1) drives cross-shop agreement counting.

schema.scrapedAt: ISO datetime -- when WE pulled it
schema.source: platform (Orvis, Grizzly Hackle, Fly Fish Food, Blackfoot-own)
schema.reporter: the actual guide/shop author -- weighting is by this, not source
schema.gauges: array of our gauge ids this report covers (crosswalk to the app)
schema.flies: array of { rank, nameRaw, nameCanonical, type(dry|nymph|dd|streamer), colors[], sizes }
schema.tipFlies: array of fly names pulled from the tip prose (cross-check)
schema.drainage: drainage key (e.g. 'bitterroot','clark-fork') -- groups rivers for future multi-drainage expansion
schema.active: bool -- true if this river maps to a live gauge in THIS app; false = parked (collected but not in the active dataset)
